name: Photon
description: Photon — Multiplayer networking engine and cloud service for Unity with relay servers, matchmaking, and 100-player rooms.

seo.title: Photon — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Photon: Photon — Multiplayer networking engine and cloud service for Unity with relay servers, matchmaking, and 100-player rooms.

when_to_use: Relay server and matchmaking for Unity multiplayer games
100-player WebGL and mobile game rooms via Photon Realtime
PUN2 integration for quick Unity networking with minimal code
Voice chat in multiplayer games via Photon Voice SDK
Low-latency game messaging at global Photon PoPs

pros: Proven at global scale in games
cons: Legacy PUN2 phased out, migration pain
review.verdict: Still one of the most reliable multiplayer stacks for Unity, mind the CCU-based pricing trap.
review.best_for: Unity studios shipping multiplayer games needing proven networking and matchmaking
review.not_for: Non-Unity engines, tiny indies wary of CCU pricing, or fully custom networking needs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: CCU-based pricing locks bill to peak concurrent users within billing period.

lock_in.reason: multiplayer engine, sessions tied to cloud
